description: During discovery, an attorney needs to redact privileged information from a document before producing it to the other side.

nodes.task_description: Open the document in a redaction tool.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has the document loaded in the appropriate software.

nodes.task_description: Identify all instances of attorney-client communication or attorney work product within the document.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the specific text to be redacted.

nodes.task_description: Apply black-box redactions over the privileged text.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully covers the sensitive information.

nodes.task_description: Produce a new version of the document with the redactions permanently applied.

expected_outcome.value: A safe, redacted version of the document is created for production.
